summary: Cathy O'Neil announces that her book 'Weapons of Math Destruction' was reviewed in the New York Review of Books alongside 'Virtual Competition' by Ezrachi and Stucke. The review, written by Sue Halpern and titled 'They Have, Right Now, Another You,' describes O'Neil's book as 'insightful and disturbing.' O'Neil expresses satisfaction with this characterization of her work.
key_points: Weapons of Math Destruction received coverage in a prestigious literary publication
The book was reviewed alongside another work on algorithmic economics
The reviewer Sue Halpern found the book both illuminating and troubling
money_quotes: She calls my book 'insightful and disturbing.' So I'm happy.
key_insight: Being called 'insightful and disturbing' is exactly the reaction a book critiquing algorithmic harm should provoke.
